params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 m365_copilot V8-A CORS Origin fix verification (deployed 2026-05-06 19:14:41 KST). CONCRETE BUG found via DB inspection: prior envelope used Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://copilot.microsoft.com but service domain is substrate.office.com — mismatched CORS would cause browser rejection. V8-A uses {{ORIGIN}} macro to echo request Origin. Test: does M365 Copilot now display warning bubble after PII submit? Note: 30d count=0 events — service has only heartbeat traffic to /apc/trans.gif. M4 dependency: user must initiate M365 Copilot chat with PII for engine to see content.

test_steps: 1. Hard reload M365 Copilot chat page
2. Submit PII prompt to M365 Copilot
3. Check Network: was POST to substrate.office.com made?
4. Check response Allow-Origin header — should match request Origin (V8-A {{ORIGIN}} echo)
5. Check console for CORS errors (V8-A SUCCESS = no CORS errors)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble + no CORS errors + mission HELD
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_no_cors_no_bubble: CORS fix worked but bubble logic still wrong — escalate envelope shape
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_cors_persists: {{ORIGIN}} macro not expanding — escalate engine code review
verdict_criteria.FAIL_traffic_not_reaching_engine: M365 Copilot routes to different endpoint than substrate.office.com — domain_patterns review
verdict_criteria.AUTH_REQUIRED_SKIP: M365 login wall — verdict acceptable, M4 user dependency

notes: 48차 m365_copilot V8-A CORS Origin fix. Concrete bug found via DB inspection (mismatched Allow-Origin). {{ORIGIN}} macro echo. Lower priority due to M4 dependency (M365 logged-in session).
